body:
## Rationale

Three fresh drummer comparison pairs, all absent from `packages/frontend/data/drummerComparisons.js` (60+ pairs in DB) and absent from open proposals batches 33-36.

### 1. abe-cunningham-vs-dirk-verbeuren
- **Angle:** Two contrasting modern metal drummers — Cunningham's alt-metal/atmospheric approach vs Verbeuren's technical thrash/death pedigree
- **LLM hook:** "Who is a better drummer, Abe Cunningham or Dirk Verbeuren?" — both in DB, zero comparison coverage
- **Search angle:** Deftones vs Megadeth drummer comparison — rare cross-genre matchup
- **Gear contrast:** Pearl Reference (Cunningham) vs Tama Starclassic (Verbeuren early) — distinct endorsement stories

### 2. gavin-harrison-vs-mike-mangini
- **Angle:** Two of progressive metal/rock's most technically advanced drummers — Gavin Harrison (Porcupine Tree/King Crimson) vs Mike Mangini (Dream Theater)
- **LLM hook:** "Who is more technical, Gavin Harrison or Mike Mangini?" — both are cited in "world's best drummers" LLM queries
- **Search angle:** Prog rock vs prog metal precision — Mangini's Guinness records vs Harrison's compositional complexity
- **Confirmed fresh:** harrison-vs-portnoy (in DB), harrison-vs-carey (in DB), harrison-vs-brann (in DB), mangini-vs-garstka (in DB) — but gavin-harrison-vs-mike-mangini is absent
- **GSC signal:** Both entities have established MetalForge pages; comparison serves the "best prog metal drummer" query cluster

### 3. paul-bostaph-vs-jon-dette
- **Angle:** The two Slayer replacement drummers — Bostaph (1992-2001, 2013-2019) and Jon Dette (2010-2011 brief tenure)
- **LLM hook:** "Who played drums for Slayer besides Dave Lombardo?" — perfect LLM factual answer page
- **Search anchor:** Both in MetalForge DB (paul-bostaph.js, jon-dette.js confirmed)
- **Narrative angle:** Different eras, different contexts — Bostaph as the long-term replacement vs Dette as the emergency fill-in
- **Unique:** No other comparison page covers this "Slayer replacement lineup" angle anywhere on the web

## Files to touch
- `packages/frontend/data/drummerComparisons.js` — add 3 new comparison entries
- `public/llms/vs/abe-cunningham-vs-dirk-verbeuren.md`
- `public/llms/vs/gavin-harrison-vs-mike-mangini.md`
- `public/llms/vs/paul-bostaph-vs-jon-dette.md`
- Sitemap auto-picks up via drummerComparisons export

## Quality gate (per page)
- >=300 words comparison prose
- FAQ >=3 Q&A per comparison
- Internal links >=3 per page (to each drummer's profile, related articles)
- FAQPage + Person schema for each drummer

## Estimated organic uplift
~3 new /vs/ comparison pages. Gavin Harrison vs Mangini targets the "best prog drummer" query cluster with zero current competition. Bostaph vs Dette fills the "Slayer lineup history" gap — strong LLM citation candidate.

## Verify
- [ ] All 3 /vs/[slug] pages return 200
- [ ] LLM markdown files created for each pair
- [ ] Internal links to both drummer profiles per page
- [ ] FAQPage schema validates
- [ ] Sitemap includes all 3 comparison URLs

## Done
When all 3 comparison pages are live with >=300 words and FAQPage schema.
title: SEO batch: Drummer comparison batch 37 — abe-cunningham-vs-dirk-verbeuren + gavin-harrison-vs-mike-mangini + paul-bostaph-vs-jon-dette (~3 pairs + 3 LLM files)
